key.name: edge-tolerance
key.description: The distance in pixels from the screen edge that triggers the warp.

key.name: pressure-threshold-ms
key.description: The time in milliseconds the cursor must press against the edge before warping.

key.name: is-enabled
key.description: Whether the mouse warp functionality is currently active.

key.name: warp-enabled
key.description: Whether the proportional warp logic is active (can be disabled to isolate debug visuals).

key.name: overlay-enabled
key.description: Show a colored circle following the cursor that changes color per monitor.

key.name: click-flash-enabled
key.description: Flash a dot at the true click position on each button press.

key.name: monitor-config
key.description: JSON mapping monitor index to overlay color and size.
